carry_verdict.reasoning_en: Within transaction-cost band. Bid/offer + execution slippage likely consumes any apparent edge.
carry_verdict.reasoning_zh: 在交易成本带内。买卖价差 + 滑点很可能吃掉这点收益。

policy_stance.reading_en: None of the three defence levers is active. PBOC is letting market dynamics run; current spot level appears inside the tolerance band.
policy_stance.reading_zh: 三条防御工具都没有出手。央行让市场自己跑，当前汇率水平在容忍区间内。
